title: Added Foods
description: A simple mod for Minecraft 1.20.1 that adds new foods to the game.
body:
[This mod is no longer supported by our team. Please see Added Foods Reviltalized for continued AF support.]

Added Food V1.0.0: A Taste of New Adventures

Welcome to the first release of the Added Food mod, where your culinary journey in Minecraft takes on a whole new flavor! This initial version brings a selection of delightful and unique food items designed to enrich your gameplay experience.

Please visit [my Ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/okinmime) to help support the development of this mods and others.

New Culinary Creations:

- Jello: A fun and bouncy treat to satisfy your sweet tooth.
- Red Jello: A vibrant twist on the classic, bursting with flavor.
- Blue Jello: A cool and refreshing variant that's sure to become a favorite.
- Plant-Based Steak: Enjoy a sustainable, green alternative with our new plant steak, available in both raw and cooked forms.
- But that’s not all! Hidden within the mod, there may be a surprise waiting for those who are adventurous enough to uncover it. This mystery addition adds an element of excitement, encouraging exploration and experimentation.

What’s Next? This is just the beginning. Future updates will continue to expand the mod with more food items and potentially other themed additions that enhance the culinary aspect of your Minecraft world. Stay tuned as we cook up new ideas to enrich your adventures!
